name: ftl-transition
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Young woman with flowing brunette hair, eyes closed, feeling something pass through her. Face caught in a moment of wrongness — space folding around her, the universe briefly incorrect. Cool blue-white light from the left side illuminating her features. Expression of concentration mixed with loss. Dark background with subtle warped light streaks suggesting FTL transit. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: deep warping hum, space folding, reality bending then snapping into place
